EscortProfile photos27$600TouringAug 13–14: Winnipeg, MB, CAMaya da RosaPetite, perfectly sculptedHome baseToronto, ON, CALast activeTodayLet’s get to know each other.

Thoughtful company, warmth and an effortless sense of connection.

Born in Salvador, Brazil and raised in Toronto, I like to think I got the best of both worlds- the warmth and rhythm of the tropics with a dash of cosmopolitan edge. I may be a city girl at heart, but when winter rolls around you’ll usually find me barefoot somewhere sunny, living in bikinis and saltwater.

I’m a total foodie and love exploring new cuisines, whether it’s a cozy hidden gem in the city or a seaside restaurant halfway across the world. I believe every great connection starts with good conversation, good company, and maybe a little wine to set the mood.

Fitness is a big part of who I am. I train five times a week and stay active, even on my “rest” days! Whether I’m on the tennis court or rolling on the mat for Brazilian Jiu Jitsu, I love the way movement makes me feel alive, confident, and centered. Living well is my love language; mind, body, and soul.

People often tell me I have a warm, easygoing energy and I take that as the best compliment! I want you to feel instantly at ease, like we’ve known each other far longer than we actually have. I’m genuine and intuitive; I connect naturally and let things unfold in their own effortless way.

I value authenticity, intimacy, and laughter- the kind of moments that can’t be forced. Let’s take our time, get to know each other, and see where that energy takes us…

Your privacy will always be respected- discretion is something I hold in the highest regard.
